result.stdout:
1.2.0.0

Version your dotnet app based on your commits

Usage: versionit [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  ProjectPath                   Git project directory or csproj file, will use current directory if not supplied

Options:
  --version                     Show version information
  -?|-h|--help                  Show help information
  -d|--dry-run                  Execute without actually committing
  --skip-dirty                  Skip dirty repository check
  -r|--release-as <RELEASE_AS>  Release as the manual version
  --silent                      Disable console output
  --skip-commit                 Skip committing changes after update
  -c|--config <CONFIG>          Configuration file path
